items.title: Shared timezone-safe labeler exists and never shifts the month
steps: 1. cd frontend && npx vitest run src/utils/timeframe.test.ts
items.expected: formatDataMonth('2026-05') === 'May 2026' and formatDataMonthShort('2026-05') === 'May 2026'; built from name arrays, no Date constructed from the key.
items.evidence: vitest: 5/5 passed including 'maps the key's own month, never a timezone-shifted one'

items.title: Timezone regression test passes
items.expected: All timeframe tests green; the May/Jan/Dec keys map to their own month.
items.evidence: vitest full suite: 5 files, 10/10 passed (incl. real component + picker tests, run under TZ=America/New_York)

items.title: Type gate + lint clean, no broken consumers of delegated helpers
steps: 3. grep for any remaining new Date(...-01) month-label pattern under src/components/PMS
items.expected: tsc exit 0; eslint 0 errors (pre-existing size warnings only); grep returns 0 matches.
items.evidence: TSC_EXIT=0, 0 errors; ESLINT_EXIT=0, 0 errors / 4 pre-existing warnings; grep-clean = 0

items.title: Month labels read the correct month for a US-timezone user
items.precondition: Logged in; a US/negative-offset timezone (e.g. America/New_York); a location with a May PMS upload (org 39 One Endodontics is the report source).
steps: 1. Open the PMS data viewer / Manage Data for a location with May data.
2. Read the month tab pill and the 'Month' summary card.
3. Open the latest-job confirm editor after an upload and read its month tab + card.
4. Trigger the 'Data already exists' conflict dialog and read the month name.
items.expected: Every label shows 'May 2026' (not 'Apr 2026'). The persisted month and submitted payload are unchanged.
items.evidence: Simulated under TZ=America/New_York (offset 240 = UTC-4). Real export 'Fredericksburg May.csv' (641 rows) all bucket to month key 2026-05 (data correct). The real MonthTabs component renders 'May 2026' (not April); the pre-fix `new Date('2026-05-01')` pattern renders 'Apr 2026' in the same zone — the reproduced bug. Full FE suite 10/10 green under US Eastern. Backend/persisted month untouched.
items.notes: Verified by timezone simulation (forced TZ + real DentalEMR data + real component render), not a live browser. Owner may still confirm in their own US-tz tab.

items.title: Month-picker tiles are labeled correctly and commit the matching month
items.precondition: Logged in; US/negative-offset timezone; the free-form 'Upload New Data' / 'Add month' flow (no preset target month).
steps: 1. Open the month picker in the manual-entry editor and in the latest-job editor.
2. Read the 12 month tiles and the 'for {month}' caption on the year step.
3. Click the tile labeled 'May', pick a year, and confirm the bucket commits to that May.
items.expected: Tiles read Jan…Dec correctly (no off-by-one); the tile labeled 'May' commits 'YYYY-05'.
items.evidence: Real MonthYearPickerModal rendered under TZ=America/New_York: clicking the tile labeled 'May' calls setTempMonth('05') — the label now matches the committed value, closing the wrong-slot pick. Picker labels are built from MONTH_NAMES_SHORT[i] / MONTH_NAMES[Number(tempMonth)-1], so they never construct a Date and never shift by timezone.
items.notes: Verified by timezone simulation (forced TZ + real component render).
